concepts.finding: Multinomial VAE for collaborative filtering with implicit feedback. VAE with multinomial likelihood outperforms MF and linear models. Bayesian variational inference provides uncertainty estimates for recommendations.
concepts.implication: Variational methods can model keyword-intent uncertainty. A keyword can belong to multiple intents with different probabilities. Uncertainty estimates enable confidence-based routing.
concepts.open_question: Should keyword-intent assignments be multi-label (probabilistic) or single-label (deterministic)?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: A multinomial VAE clustering keywords into soft intents outperforms k-Means hard clustering in downstream task performance (e.g., search ranking).
